RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, ELPIDIO GOMEZ, VERONICA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KASSIS, ISSAM N RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ, ELPIDIO GOMEZ, VERONICA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANTS VACATED PREMISES ON JANUARY 29, 2014. $12,484.80 RENT, $1,575.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $609.50 COSTS, $3,300.00 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,369.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
